tools.name: kinthai_upload_file
tools.description: Upload a local file to a KinthAI conversation. Returns {ok:true, data:{file_id, message_id}} on success, or {ok:false, error, hint} on failure. Call this for any file the user asks you to send, or for AI-generated content longer than 500 characters. On failure, do NOT claim the file was sent — the response will tell you it failed. If you don't get a tool result back at all, also assume the file was not sent. Do not also write [FILE:] markers in the same reply; the tool replaces them.

conversation_id.description: Target conversation id (use the conversation you are currently replying in).

local_path.description: Absolute path on the agent machine. Must be inside the agent workspace, /tmp, or ~/.openclaw — other paths return path_denied.

caption.description: Optional caption to send alongside the file.
